data.description:

Ryanair Holdings ( (DE:RY4C) ) has issued an update.

Ryanair Holdings plc has reported that its issued share capital as of April 30, 2026, comprises 1,041,512,598 ordinary shares, each with a nominal value of €0.006. The airline confirmed it holds no shares in treasury, meaning all issued shares currently carry full voting rights for investors.

The disclosed total of voting shares provides a key reference figure for shareholders assessing whether they must report new or altered holdings under Irish and EU transparency regulations. This update ensures market participants have an accurate denominator for regulatory notifications, supporting compliance and maintaining transparency in Ryanair’s shareholder base.

More about Ryanair Holdings

Ryanair Holdings plc is a leading European low-cost airline group, operating short-haul flights across a broad network of routes. The company focuses on budget travel within Europe, leveraging high aircraft utilization and ancillary revenues to maintain its competitive position in the continent’s price-sensitive air travel market.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

The latest announcement is out from Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ).

Standard Chartered PLC reported that, as of 30 April 2026, its issued ordinary share capital comprised 2,216,902,638 shares of $0.50 each, all carrying one vote per share and with no shares held in treasury. This disclosure, made under UK Financial Conduct Authority transparency rules, sets the official total voting rights figure that investors must use when calculating and reporting significant shareholdings or changes in their ownership stake in the bank.

By confirming the unchanged share count and absence of treasury shares, the announcement provides clarity and stability for shareholders monitoring their regulatory reporting thresholds. The update ensures market participants have an accurate denominator for disclosure obligations, supporting transparency in the bank’s ownership structure and helping regulators and investors track significant movements in its share register.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:STAN) stock is a Hold with a £19.75 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Standard Chartered stock, see the GB:STAN Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, STAN is a Neutral.

The score is driven by strong earnings-call fundamentals (record income, solid profitability and shareholder returns) and reasonable valuation, partially offset by deteriorating cash-flow quality and high leverage in the financials, plus weak current technical momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on STAN stock, click here.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a multinational banking and financial services group headquartered in the U.K., with a primary focus on retail and commercial banking, corporate and institutional banking, and wealth management. The bank operates across Asia, Africa and the Middle East, concentrating on emerging markets and cross-border trade and finance.

Baronsmead Second Venture Trust has confirmed its current capital structure and voting rights following the close of business on 30 April 2026, reporting 495,704,729 ordinary shares in issue, of which 62,912,241 are held in treasury. data.title: NRC Group Ends Swedish Project Dispute, Cuts Risk Exposure
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

NRC Group ASA ( (NNRRF) ) has shared an announcement.

NRC Group ASA announced that AGN Haga AB, in which its Swedish subsidiary holds a 20% stake, has reached a final settlement with Trafikverket on the E03 Kvarnberget project, concluding years of financial and contractual uncertainty. Together with the previously settled E04 Station Haga contract, this agreement ends all outstanding claims between AGN and Trafikverket, results in a total cost of SEK 14 million for NRC Group with neutral liquidity impact, and releases all parent company guarantees and sureties, reducing risk and strengthening the company’s financial foundation going forward.

The settlement involves a net payment of SEK 40 million from AGN to Trafikverket, of which NRC Group’s share is SEK 8 million, plus an additional SEK 6 million under a separate shareholder cost arrangement. Management highlighted that the long-running case, handled by the Swedish team, demonstrates how sustained effort in dispute resolution can protect the business and improve the company’s risk profile, potentially enhancing its position for future infrastructure projects and stakeholder confidence.

More about NRC Group ASA

NRC Group ASA operates in the rail infrastructure and construction sector, with activities that include railway construction projects and related civil engineering services. Through its Swedish subsidiary Nordic Railway Construction Sverige AB, the company participates in large-scale infrastructure contracts, often in partnership structures such as AGN Haga AB, serving public sector clients like Trafikverket.

Average Trading Volume: 545,778

Current Market Cap: NOK1.49B

See more insights into NNRRF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Galilei Lifts Dividend as Profits and Sales Rise, Forecasts Further Growth for FY2027
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

FUKUSHIMA GALILEI CO., LTD. ( (JP:6420) ) just unveiled an update.

Galilei Co., Ltd. reported consolidated net sales of ¥138.6 billion for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, up 6.1% year on year, with operating profit rising 3.1% to ¥17.1 billion and profit attributable to owners of the parent increasing 2.4% to ¥12.3 billion. The company’s equity-to-asset ratio improved to 73.4%, while cash and cash equivalents fell to ¥42.5 billion due to heavier investing cash outflows, indicating active capital deployment alongside sustained profitability.

The board approved a higher annual dividend of ¥82 per share for fiscal 2026, up from ¥74, lifting the consolidated payout ratio to 26.7% and signaling continued emphasis on shareholder returns. For the year to March 31, 2027, Galilei forecasts further growth with net sales expected to rise 4.5% to ¥144.9 billion and earnings per share projected at ¥309.59, pointing to modest profit expansion and a stable earnings trajectory despite a slowdown in operating margin growth.

More about FUKUSHIMA GALILEI CO., LTD.

Galilei Co., Ltd., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operates under Japanese GAAP and reports consolidated results across its group businesses. The company generates over ¥130 billion in annual net sales and maintains a high equity-to-asset ratio above 70%, underscoring a solid financial base and a stable shareholder structure. Its operations deliver double-digit operating margins, reflecting efficient management and profitability.

Average Trading Volume: 65,029

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen150.3B

See more insights into 6420 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest announcement is out from ASOS plc ( (GB:ASC) ).

ASOS has disclosed that Chief Financial Officer Aaron Izzard received 20,141 ordinary shares following the vesting of awards under the company’s Long Term Incentive Scheme on 29 April 2026. After selling 9,490 shares to meet tax and fee obligations, he retains 10,651 shares, bringing his total holding to 27,543 shares, or approximately 0.023% of ASOS’s issued share capital.

The transaction, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, reflects standard executive remuneration practice and aligns the CFO’s interests more closely with those of shareholders. The disclosure, made under UK Market Abuse Regulations, offers investors additional transparency on insider holdings at a time when governance and incentive alignment remain key focus areas for market participants.

data.title: Banca CF+ Launches Mandatory Tender and Exchange Offer for Remaining Banca Sistema Shares
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Banca Sistema S.p.A. ( (IT:BST) ) is now available.

Banca CF+ S.p.A. has published the offer document and acceptance form for its mandatory total public tender and exchange offer for the remaining ordinary shares of Banca Sistema S.p.A. not already owned, amounting to about 19.249% of the bank’s share capital. The move formalizes the process approved by Consob and clarifies the terms, venues and timetable for shareholders to access offer information.

The offer values each Banca Sistema share at €1.89, combining a €1.432 cash component with a €0.458 element payable either in Kruso Kapital S.p.A. shares or, at the shareholder’s choice, in cash, with a 25‑trading‑day acceptance period running from 11 May to 12 June 2026. The structure and calendar of the bid, including a possible reopening of the offer window after the initial payment date, mark a key step in Banca CF+’s effort to consolidate control of Banca Sistema and could materially reshape the bank’s shareholder base and governance once the independent directors’ opinion is issued and investors decide whether to tender.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:BST) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Banca Sistema S.p.A. stock, see the IT:BST Stock Forecast page.

More about Banca Sistema S.p.A.

Banca Sistema S.p.A. is an Italian banking group focused on specialty finance, particularly factoring and credit solutions, with a strong presence in Milan. It operates in the financial services industry, serving corporate, institutional and public-sector clients, and its shares are listed on the Italian market, making it a target for strategic transactions in the domestic banking sector.

Average Trading Volume: 264,800

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €132.7M

Find detailed analytics on BST stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Barclays ( (GB:BARC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Barclays PLC has admitted an additional 5,670,419 ordinary shares to trading on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange, bringing the total number of shares admitted to 13,634,354,256. The newly issued shares, which are fully fungible with existing stock, reflect share issuances over the period from 1 April to 30 April 2026 and marginally expand the bank’s listed equity base, with potential implications for liquidity and share capital structure.

The admission under the Financial Conduct Authority’s prospectus and regulated market rules underscores Barclays’ ongoing use of the public markets to manage its capital and support its broad banking operations. While the increase is relatively small compared with total shares outstanding, it maintains the bank’s flexibility in capital planning and may incrementally enhance trading volumes for investors on the London Stock Exchange.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:BARC) stock is a Buy with a £570.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Barclays stock, see the GB:BARC Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BARC is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid but cyclical financial performance (improving profitability and strong 2024–2025 cash conversion, tempered by higher leverage and revenue softness).
